hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(cpp|h|pri|pro)$'; then cd /home/johe2/optiflow5 && make -j4 -q 2>/dev/null; if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo '⚠️ Source changed — build may be needed'; fi; fi

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '/(moc|objects|rcc)/|/Makefile$|/Makefile\.(Debug|Release)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: This is a qmake-generated file. Edit the .pro/.pri source files instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi
